en: That's Chocolate Bar. He's gave my Justin diarrhoea.
How do you know it was the chocolate? Cos that's all he had yesterday.
He ate it outside the shop and by the time I'd got home he'd shat all up his back.
No, I didn't have the chocolate. Do any of wee Justin's brothers or sisters
have diarrhoea? No, they didn't have it either.
Does anybody else in your immediate family have diarrhoea?
No. So, wee Justin was the only one who ate the
Right. I think we might have arrived at the problem here.
You see, when you bought your Chocolate Bar yesterday, it wasn't this size.
No, no, no, no, no. It was actually this size.
You gave a two-year-old a slab of chocolate the size of a headstone.
Jeff Capes would have shite up his back if he ate that amount of chocolate.
Take a hike, Chancer, and take shitey ass with you.
